inputs.prompt: Task Router UI work item and Architect UI constraints
inputs.context: Pipeline context including API contracts, design requirements, and platform constraints

outputs.primary: UI implementation changes with visual verification steps and file references
outputs.format: Outcome summary, changed components, styling notes, and validation results

failure_handling.on_layout_mismatch: Adjust layout to match spec precisely; do not break existing flows
failure_handling.on_api_mismatch: Coordinate with Backend Engineer; update UI to match contracts or request contract fix
